title: Asterisk Full Log Dialplan Context Error Rate
app: Custom TA, HEC, or Universal Forwarder mapping Asterisk logs to `asterisk:pjsip`, `asterisk:cdr`, `asterisk:queue_log`, `asterisk:full`, `asterisk:messages`, `asterisk:security`, `asterisk:ami`
spl:
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:full" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw, "(?i)WARNING|ERROR") AND match(_raw, "(?i)dialplan|app_|pbx_|Goto|Extension")
| eval context=coalesce(context, CONTEXT, "unknown")
| stats count by context
| eventstats sum(count) as tot
| eval err_share_pct=round(100*count/tot,3)
| sort -count
description: Dialplan errors spike after module upgrades or AGI database failures. Share by context isolates the broken macro or subroutine quickly.
value: Reduces unexplained call failures and speeds rollback decisions.
implementation: (1) Noise-filter music-on-hold chatter. (2) Baseline per context. (3) Alert on 3x baseline. (4) Pair with Git history.
visualization: Bar by context; timechart error rate.
grandmaExplanation: We watch this Asterisk system’s calls and health, so trunks, queues, and voicemail stay in shape for everyday use.
knownFalsePositives: Dialplan changes, new IVR, and one-off test calls that create benign parse noise during cutover.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable; primary SPL uses raw or vendor-normalized event fields.
